mapper.select: select r.*, g.name goodsName, s.name storageName, gt.name goodstypeName, (select u.name from p_user u where r.userId = u.id) userName, (select u.name from p_user u where r.adminId = u.id) adminName from record r,goods g,storage s,goodstype gt /* where r.goods = g.id and g.storage = s.id and g.goodstype = gt.id*/ ${ew.customSqlSegment}
